description: What are the best options for renting a car in Madeira with full insurance, no deductible, and flexible pickup/drop-off locations?
narrative: The user seeks a car rental service in Madeira that offers comprehensive, all-inclusive insurance without additional deductibles, transparent pricing, and the convenience of pickup and drop-off at multiple locations across the island—not just the airport. They prioritize reliability, customer service, and flexibility for exploring Madeira’s winding roads and remote attractions. Relevance is determined by whether the document explicitly mentions zero-deductible coverage, free cancellation, delivery to non-airport locations, and positive customer feedback on service quality and insurance transparency. Documents that only list generic car rental companies without these specific benefits, or focus solely on hiking or public transport, are not relevant.

title: Perfect Baked Potatoes
description: What is the optimal method for baking small potatoes to achieve a crispy exterior and tender interior, with flavor enhancements and accurate cooking times?
narrative: The user seeks a reliable, flavorful recipe for baking small potatoes—specifically new or pomegranate potatoes—that delivers a golden, crispy crust and melt-in-the-mouth interior. They want guidance on seasoning (e.g., rosemary, olive oil, garlic, paprika), accurate cooking time and temperature (noting conflicting reports of 20 vs. 60+ minutes at 180°C), and techniques to avoid common pitfalls like undercooking or excessive salt. Relevance is determined by recipes that detail step-by-step preparation, include user-tested adjustments based on feedback, and emphasize texture and flavor balance—not planting, storage, or unrelated potato dishes like boiled or fried. Documents with firsthand cooking experiences, corrections to flawed instructions, and recommendations for garnishes or serving pairings are highly relevant; those discussing gardening, nutritional science, or unrelated meats are not.

title: Return-to-Work Bonus
description: What financial assistance is available for individuals returning to employment after a period of unemployment or low-income status in France, and what are the eligibility criteria and application procedures?
narrative: The user seeks information on state-backed financial incentives designed to support reintegration into the labor market after prolonged unemployment, particularly for recipients of RSA, SSA, or similar social benefits. Relevance is determined by programs that provide direct monetary bonuses or targeted aid (e.g., APRE, employment premium) upon resuming work, with specific conditions such as duration of employment (e.g., 4+ months), income thresholds, and application through CAF, Pôle Emploi, or local councils. Irrelevant results include general employment contracts, tax cuts, or aid for employers (e.g., Emploi Franc), as well as programs no longer active (e.g., PEP abolished in 2016). The user needs precise, current, and localized details on how to claim these benefits, including documentation, payment timing, and regional variations.
